title: Grokが10秒になったので峠プロンプトで遊んでみる❶
rationale: 本文は映像演出を明示する動画生成で、「Ultra-fast FPV drone POV at night, Japanese touge time-attack. The drone flies 10–20cm above the asphalt, extreme speed sensation, wide FOV but stable horizon, high shutter clarity (almost no smear). A tuned sports car is full attack, late braking into hairpins, instant throttle on exit, minimal drift—pure grip aggression. The drone stays glued to the rear bumper, then slingshots to the inside apex, skimming the guardrail by centimeters, sparks from tiny gravel hits, road reflectors (cats-eyes) strobing past like bullets. Rapid micro elevation changes, compression and rebound over bumps, audible turbo spool + wastegate, engine screaming.」が中心だから。
evidence_checked: summary: Ultra-fast FPV drone POV at night, Japanese touge time-attack. The drone flies…

body1: Ultra-fast FPV drone POV at night, Japanese touge time-attack. The drone flies 10–20cm above the asphalt, extreme speed sensation, wide FOV but stable horizon, high shutter clarity (almost no smear). A tuned sports car is full attack, late braking into hairpins, instant throttle on exit, minimal drift—pure grip aggression. The drone stays glued to the rear bumper, then slingshots to the inside apex, skimming the guardrail by centimeters, sparks from tiny gravel hits, road reflectors (cats-eyes) strobing past like bullets. Rapid micro elevation changes, compression and rebound over bumps, audible turbo spool + wastegate, engine screaming.
body2: BGM: hard techno / rave (155–165 BPM), relentless kick, driving offbeat bass, short risers into every corner entry, sharp crash on apex, energetic “drop” immediately。
risk_note: archive marker doc。埋め込み本文を基準に分類。

Hyper-real, cold crisp air, subtle prop-wash snow trails, micro vibrations but stabilized, minimal rolling shutter, high clarity. Sound design includes wind pressure and occasional ice crack.
